type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (03-18) is reporting NOx, CO, VOC, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx, CO, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions decreased by 7%
2) CO emissions decreased by 7%
3) VOC emissions decreased by 13%
4) PM10 emissions increased by 16%
5) PM2.5 emissions increased by 16%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Flaring volume increased from 882.8 e3m3 to 1099.2 e3m3.
2) Decreased runtime on three generator engines.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (03-18) is reporting NOx, CO, VOC, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. This facility reported NOx, CO2, and PM2.5 emissions for 2012. The following changes occurred from 2012 to 2013, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 327.26 to 362.23 tonnes (+11%)
2) CO2 emissions decreased from 236.33 to 278.46 tonnes (+18%)
3) VOC emissions increased from 11.02 to 16.97 tonnes (+54%)
4) PM10 emissions increased from 0.98 to 3.24 tonnes (+231%)
5) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.98 to 3.24 tonnes (+231%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Flaring volume increased from 1.3 e3m3 to 882.8 e3m3.
2) Increased runtime on three (3) Caterpillar 1,200 hp compressor engines.
3) Increase in production.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (03-18) is reporting NOx, CO2, VOC, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2012. This facility reported NOx, CO2, and PM2.5 emissions for 2011. The following changes occured from 2011 to 2012, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 131.97 to 327.26 tonnes (+148%)
2) CO2 emissions increased from 97.05 to 236.33 tonnes (+144%)
3) VOC emissions increased from 5.58 to 11.02 tonnes (+97%)
4) PM10 emissions increased from 0.45 to 0.98 tonnes (+116%)
5) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.45 to 0.98 tonnes (+116%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Large equipment expansion; added three (3) Waukesha 1480 hp engines and one (1) Caterpillar 1200 hp engine during 2012;
2) Increased run time on all compressor engines;
3) Updated emission factor for Caterpillar engine used; sourced from manufacturer instead of CAPP 2004.
